name: brain-docpack
description: Local DocPack tooling for the rtime brain knowledge library.

interface.shortDescription: Audit, sample, build, and validate local DocPacks.
interface.longDescription: Brain DocPack provides local-first workflow guidance for auditing, sampling, building, and validating DocPack artifacts for the rtime brain knowledge library. It keeps writes explicit and treats rendered pages, manifests, citations, and risk flags as evidence.
